summary: An excellent soundboard source captures a stellar November ’73 show, highlighted by a flawless first set and a marathon second‑set Truckin’ > The Other One > Stella sequence plus standout Weather Report Suite and China Cat Sunflower/I Know You Rider.
review: Fans rave about both the music and the recording: the soundboard is crisp and virtually glitch‑free, while the performance shines with a powerhouse first set and an epic second‑set that rolls from Promised Land through Bertha into a 40‑minute Truckin’/The Other One/Stella marathon. Standout moments include Weather Report Suite (Let It Grow), China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider, Sugar Magnolia and a rousing Uncle John’s Band encore.

ai_rating.rationale: All nine reviews are glowing (5‑star), praising both the musical performance and the recording quality; consistent praise across many reviewers yields a strong, confident high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, clear SBD with minimal patches; reviewers note “flawless sound” and that this source is the best of the available versions. Minor distortion in alternate mixes is irrelevant to this patched master.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
Promised Land > Bertha > The Greatest Story Ever Told
show_quality.setlist_flow: A tight, high‑energy first set flows into a marathon second set with superb song pairings and seamless segues; the show is praised for its pacing, dynamics, and sustained improvisational intensity.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s guitar tone and improvisations are repeatedly lauded as perfect and “wizard‑like”.
band_member_comments.Bob: Weir receives praise for his rhythm work and “wonderful contributions”, especially on the second‑set jams.
